summary.text: Customers find the water dispenser versatile, particularly appreciating its use at the dog park and beach. The product holds a fair amount of water and works well for walks. However, the build quality receives mixed feedback, with some finding it solid while others describe it as cheaply made. Moreover, portability is a concern, with some finding it convenient for walks while others say it's difficult to carry. Additionally, durability is a significant issue, with multiple customers reporting that the strap breaks within a week of use.

authors_reviews.title: The best for selective drinkers, but weak handle
authors_reviews.text: Love, love, love. This water bottle is fabulous. My dog is very picky about what he drinks out of and the little bowl on the bottom was a real hit. I can drink out of the bottle and he can also drink out of the bowl. It has a nice big wide strap which makes carrying very easy. Heavy plastic and holds a lot Of water. Highly recommend.UPDATE: After three days of use the handle broke and carrying this 50 ounces is now a bit difficult. I am very disappointed as I love this bottle.
authors_reviews.author: Kristin

authors_reviews.title: Love it!
authors_reviews.text: It's giant and the bowl works great. My only issue is that I used the cap connecting strap as a handle to carry it around, and it broke..... So don't use it as a handle! Other than that, I love it!
authors_reviews.author: Jenn

authors_reviews.title: Durability and Sturdiness are in Doubt
authors_reviews.text: I've only had this product for a couple of weeks at this point. It looks good and works well with a few minor caveats. The biggest problem I suspect we're going to have is with durability and sturdiness. From day one, the German Shepherd puppy (1 yo) here is very interested in carrying this himself. He is not allowed to carry it because the strap holding the lit on will not survive for long. He also found the bottle in his tote bag of supplies and decided to hold it down to chew on a bit. I rescued it before it was damaged but I have a sinking feeling it will not survive long term (though I'm getting better at hiding the highly desired items that he likes to steal so that I'll chase him and pay attention to him). In practical terms, the biggest negative is that it is labeled as hand wash only.
authors_reviews.author: S Miller

authors_reviews.title: Gets the job done!
authors_reviews.text: This bottle size is perfect for my dog. He’s a standard bull terrier and he drinks quite a lot. This bottle lasts him for an hour of fetch. I take it with me to the dog parks, lakes, hikes, etc. It may be big but I don’t really care since it holds the needed amount for my dog to drink. The rubber bowl is great, not sliding when he drinks out of it. The cover could get in the way of pouring but I learned how to hold it away when doing so. Appreciate that it has a handle for carrying. Cleaning is a bit tough because if it’s shape but overall a good water bottle!
authors_reviews.author: GW

authors_reviews.title: It comes in handy especially now with this hot weather
authors_reviews.text: The only thing I had issues with is the handle around the rim is not as sturdy as expected it broke in less then 3 wks. Other then that it's perfect when I'm on the road and with this hot weather.
authors_reviews.author: Erica M.

authors_reviews.title: Broke after 2 weeks
authors_reviews.text: This is a great concept for a water bottle for a dog, I love the bowl and I love that it’s essentially a part of the water bottle. I gave it such a low rating because after using it maybe a total of 7 times over 2 weeks, the handle broke off of the neck of the bottle, making it difficult to carry the intended way. I will be purchasing something else instead because $20+ for something that lasts 2 weeks is not worth it in my book
authors_reviews.author: Jennifer

authors_reviews.title: Great size
authors_reviews.text: Great size. Bottom cup would be good for medium size dog
authors_reviews.author: Deborrah Richey

authors_reviews.title: Strap Breaks After 2.5 Months
authors_reviews.text: The bottle is great and perfect for hot summer walks with my Lab mix. I really loved this until after 2.5 months of use, the strap snapped mid walk. I tried using it with the broken strap and that is incredibly uncomfortable. I also tried using Gorilla Glue for plastic to glue it back together. That also broke mid walk the next time I used it. Overall, great product, but they must improve this aspect. It's just unusable once the strap breaks. Don't waste your money. They have a more expensive bottle with a different handle. Call me stupid, but I'm trying that next. The other bottles just don't have enough capacity for my thirsty, furry girl.
authors_reviews.author: Cara Brown
